title: Everything Should Be Craftable
description: A useful mod that makes items such as nametags, saddles, obsidian, and even bedrock craftable.
body:
## **EverythingShouldBeCraftable**
This mod adds many new crafting recipes to the game, such as tridents, totems, saddles, nametags, and spawn eggs. This mod was made for _**Fabric only**_ (Forge support may be added in the future), and it aims to not only make some items renewable, but also make your quality of life better. You can view the full list of craftable items [**here**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hz5qEqczks_gopcX3pdt1gP5HxQ4_hTWJ3irt4G7nJY/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.d58pyy4t8yzv). I will do my best to add more recipes and update to the latest version whenever I can.
